payload.formName: Marvin Ventures x Careerspan Perk Redemption

questions.name: What is the link to your LinkedIn profile?
Are you a Marvin Ventures founder (portfolio company or community member)
How many roles are you looking to hire for?
Which of the following hiring pain points resonate strongly? (Select all that apply)
value: I'm spending too much time screening candidates (especially bad ones)
My best candidates seem to drop out of the process
My ATS isn't helping me narrow down candidates meaningfully

questions.name: (If currently open) Please share a link to the posting (or JD copy) of your highest priority role
Do you consent to being contacted by Careerspan to redeem your Marvin Ventures perk?
